title: Free Movement
wikitext:
[[File:Dash on water.gif|thumb|center|450px]]
'''Free Movement''' is the ability to travel on materials impossible to walk on normally or traverse through hard terrain with ease.

==Summary==
The user can stand, walk or run on the surface of liquids and gases without sinking through them.

The user can also gain this power by swiftly moving through difficult terrain such as mud or deep snow without being hindered by them.

This can be accomplished via [[Superhuman Speed|sheer speed]], by releasing energy that keeps the liquids or gas under their feet stable, or by [[Elemental Manipulation|manipulating the terrain]] itself to make going through it easier.

==Possible Uses==
*'''Water Walking:''' This allows the user to walk on water.
*'''Cloud Walking:''' The same as water walking, but for clouds.
*'''Snow Walking:''' The ability to easily pass through a thick layer of snow.

==Users==
*Various Shinobi ([[Naruto (Verse)|Naruto]])
*[[Dusknoir]] ([[Pokémon]])
*[[Dash]] ([[Disney]])
*[[Quicksilver (Marvel Comics)|Quicksilver]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Lapis Lazuli (Steven Universe)|Lapis Lazuli]], [[Opal (Steven Universe)|Opal]], and [[Lion (Steven Universe)|Lion]] ([[Steven Universe (Verse)|Steven Universe]])
